conditions.description: Context compaction mid-sprint required session resumption

training.description: First extraction of SLOPE into standalone package

nutrition.description: Clean ESM, strict TS, no dead code
Read all source files before porting

nineteenth_hole.how_did_it_feel: Smooth extraction — the SLOPE code was already well-decoupled from CaddyStack
nineteenth_hole.advice_for_next_player: The formatter test adaptations need careful attention — ProjectStats replaces SpecStatusSummary with different key names
nineteenth_hole.excited_about_next: Publishing to npm, wiring CaddyStack to depend on @srbryers/core

bunker_locations: Dynamic imports in test files can be missed by batch sed replacements
CLI packages need @types/node explicitly — not inherited from monorepo root
process.exit() doesn't narrow types in strict TS — add return after for type safety
course_management_notes: Sprint 1 of independent slope repo — uses its own sprint tracker (dogfooding)
247 tests, 8 test files, ~2300 lines source, ~3600 lines tests
